overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a blue and white jacket walking through an industrial corridor with red walls and neon lighting. The character approaches two NPCs standing near a security checkpoint in a futuristic facility.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward two standing figures near a security gate

notable_agents.action: armored security guard standing with weapon, facing the approaching player character
civilian in green jacket standing with hands behind back, facing away from the player

entered.detail: painted red metal wall with industrial panels running along the right side of the corridor
elevated metal walkway with railings spanning the upper level of the corridor
illuminated red neon sign hanging above the security checkpoint area
tall structural pillar with vertical red LED light strips on the left side
white rectangular counter or desk structure on the right side near the wall
metal grated gate blocking the far end of the corridor with vertical bars
red fire safety box mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with red walls and overhead catwalks, approaching two NPCs standing near a security checkpoint. The scene features cool blue and red neon lighting, with a metal security gate visible at the far end and industrial architecture throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that leads toward a secure facility checkpoint. It begins by trailing the player character as they navigate a corridor defined by red walls and overhead catwalks. As the character advances, the environment is bathed in a contrast of cool blue and red neon lighting that highlights the surrounding industrial architecture. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches two NPCs stationed near a metal security gate at the far end of the passage.
